rankings.why_it_matters: Signals demographic and migration shifts affecting costs, productivity, and economic models in a services-driven economy.

rankings.title: Clean Energy Gambit: How hike in fuel prices is charging up India’s EV market; What numbers are saying?
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the cause-effect relationship between fuel prices and EV adoption in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Connects a policy/pricing lever (fuel taxes) to behavioral and market shifts in a strategic sector.

rankings.title: India can save ₹2.5 trillion by doubling AC energy efficiency: Study
rankings.india_relevance: Presents a data-driven analysis of energy efficiency potential specific to India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Quantifies a massive economic and environmental opportunity tied to a ubiquitous consumer durable.

rankings.title: Indian drugmakers deepen US bets despite decline in pharma exports
rankings.india_relevance: Covers a strategic pivot by a flagship Indian industry in a key export market.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows companies moving beyond generic exports to more complex engagements (R&D, manufacturing) in response to market pressures.

rankings.title: Schroders Capital plans to build on $1 bn India investment as scope for early investor exits grows beyond IPOs
rankings.india_relevance: Insider analysis from a major global investor on India's private market evolution.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights maturation of India's capital ecosystem (secondary sales, buyouts) which is crucial for startup and PE growth.

rankings.title: India’s AI boom could turn data centres into the next big infrastructure race: KPMG
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses the downstream infrastructure demand triggered by AI adoption in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Identifies a new, capital-intensive investment theme with real estate, energy, and tech policy implications.

rankings.title: SIP boom a bane for Indian stock market: Is retail money giving FPIs a smooth exit and hurting rupee?
rankings.india_relevance: Presents a contrarian, analytical thesis on a dominant trend in Indian capital markets.
rankings.why_it_matters: Questions the net impact of retail inflows, linking them to forex and valuation pressures—a critical debate for investors.

rankings.title: From handshakes to algorithms: how machine-driven hard trust is reshaping business
rankings.india_relevance: Explores a fundamental shift in business transactions relevant to India's formalizing economy.
rankings.why_it_matters: Discusses the move from relational to algorithmic trust, affecting everything from lending to supply chain contracts.

rankings.title: Aluminium exports to Japan, Korea and Taiwan have risen marginally after West Asia crisis created supply gaps: Hindalco
rankings.india_relevance: Shows specific Indian export gains from a global supply chain disruption.
rankings.why_it_matters: A concrete example of how geopolitical events can create opportunistic trade advantages for Indian manufacturers.

rankings.title: REITs distribute over ₹8,900 crore to unitholders in FY26
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights the growing scale and income-generating role of a new asset class in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: Demonstrates the maturation of India's real estate capital markets, providing yield options for investors.

rankings.title: Priority sector lending boosts inclusion, not always guarantee growth: EAC-PM
rankings.india_relevance: Insider analysis from the PM's economic advisory council on a key banking policy.
rankings.why_it_matters: Nuanced evaluation of a long-standing mandate, balancing social goals with economic efficiency—key for policy debate.

rankings.title: Cement companies may need Rs 5–7 per bag price hike to offset rising fuel costs: Nomura - financialexpress.com
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses cost-pass-through mechanics in a core infrastructure industry.
rankings.why_it_matters: Quantifies the inflationary pressure from energy costs on a critical input for construction and housing.

rankings.title: Integrating Renewables: CEA’s transmission plan for 900 GW of non-fossil fuel capacity by 2035-36
rankings.india_relevance: Primary source detail from the Central Electricity Authority on renewable integration plans.
rankings.why_it_matters: The grid blueprint is a prerequisite for India's energy transition, revealing scale and planning challenges.

rankings.title: Supreme Court’s new push on solid waste management: Are states ready for a new era of waste governance?
rankings.india_relevance: Explores the implementation challenges of a major judicial/policy directive on urban infrastructure.
rankings.why_it_matters: Waste management is a critical, underfunded urban challenge with environmental, health, and municipal finance angles.

rankings.title: As Strait of Hormuz fears grow, Canada makes an energy pitch to India
rankings.india_relevance: Highlights a new trade dynamic emerging from geopolitical risk affecting India's energy security.
rankings.why_it_matters: Shows how global suppliers are repositioning to capitalize on India's need to diversify oil and gas imports.
